description: Correct founder name from 'Kriss Judd' to 'Kriss Aseniero' on the About page and in supporting documentation.

userStories.title: Update founder name in About page team section
userStories.description: As a site visitor viewing the About page, I want to see the correct founder name so that I have accurate information about who runs the care home.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The team array entry at index 0 has `name: 'Kriss Aseniero'`.
The string `Kriss Judd` does not appear anywhere in `src/app/about/page.tsx`.

userStories.title: Update documentation references
userStories.description: As a developer or AI assistant working on the codebase, I want all documentation to reference the correct founder name so that the incorrect name does not propagate into future work.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `grep -r 'Kriss Judd' CLAUDE.md memory/` returns no results.
